name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
B , crafted from topstitched leather and canvas, featuring the Horseferry print from the brand's fashion show, with a beautifully engraved logo clasp. Easily switch between crossbody, shoulder, or handbag styles.
Size: 25 x 8.5 x 18cm
Style No.: 8350
